1.content:
Long ago, when the pyramids were still young, the ancients played a game of great and terrible power. A game of shadows were monsters were brought to life to fight for the sake of their masters, be it the noble or the corrupt. These 'Shadow Games' were thought to have been disposed of by a brave pharaoh who sealed the magic away. However, they say that the shadows can never be destroyed...

The Millennium Spell Book, used in the creation of the Millennium Items, had the most diabolical spells, curses and shadow magic written within its text. Deep in the back pages, however, hid truly dark spells. Spells that afflicted mortal man with what most would describe as 'body horror'. These afflictions were inscribed on stone tablets just as the ancient monsters were, but weren't incorporated into the card game for reasons unknown...

Until today.

In an old shack far beyond the outskirts of Domino City, an avid archeologist was creating an unstable deck of these horrific shadow spells.

"Finally, at long last I've recreated the lost spells into my own Duel Monsters deck!" He exclaimed, brimming with pride despite the danger these cards could put an unsuspecting duelist into. "Now to put the finishing touches on my duel disk and I can try this out..."

He got up for a minute or two before walking into the garage to complete the repairs on his outdated duel disk. Unfortunately for him he forgot to close the window where he left the deck. As the summer breeze picked up, the cards blew away into the sky, setting a course for central Domino City..

11.title: It's Time To F-F-F-Fatten!

111.content:
"Hmm..." Sighed Yugi as he watched TV in the card shop's living room. Grandpa Muto was away on a trip with Professor Hawkins and said he'd be out for a couple of weeks. At first Yugi was excited about getting some time with himself. Then it dawned on him that things can get real boring, real fast, especially when the shop is closed in the first place. He'd try to call and see if his friends wanted to come over, but they were all busy. Tea was too caught up in her job at Burger World, Joey was sorting out family problems, and he hasn't heard back from the voicemails he left for Tristan and Bakura. It was just so dull. Because of it, Yugi had just been watching reruns of past duel tournaments on TV while raiding the cabinets for snacks. It was only a matter of time before it showed...

"Yugi, don't you think you're getting a little... er..." Yami stuttered, trying to find the right words.

"What is it, Yami?" Yugi asked, shoveling a handful of Cheez-Its into his mouth.

"Well, you're getting kind of... pudgy."

"What do you-" Yugi looked down at himself, but he couldn't see his toes. He instead saw a crumb-covered tummy poking out from underneath his black tank top. All the laying around and snacking he'd been doing had gone straight to his gut.

"I always thought you were cute, Yugi, but now you're just plain adorable." Yami teased while poking Yugi's tummy. His now-chubby cheeks blushing a beet red.

"Quit it, Yami!" He cried, trying to cover his new built-in pillow but to no avail. He knew his other half was just messing with him, but it gave him a weird feeling about being chubby. Something he hadn't felt before. Was it that he had a secret admiration towards his new frame?
111.title: A Seemingly Normal Day At The Kame Game Shop.

1111.content:
"Yugi, is that a card stuck to the outside of your window?"

Yugi turned and, sure enough, a card was wedged in the frame of one of his living room windows. He hooped off the couch, his new belly jiggling slightly as he did so, and walked over to the window where he plucked the card which was jammed in to the corner of the window. The young dualist flipped it over. The image on the card reminded him of the fat goblin on the Just Desserts card though this one had paler skin and some kind of ornate headdress on.

"The...Swell of Mass? Pharaoh, have you ever heard of this?" Yugi asked, still examining the card.

"Hmm, I cannot say that I have," Yami replied.

Yugi held the card up to his eyes and read the text. It was a Magic card with a continuous effect. "On your next draw phase, draw 2 cards. Then draw 3 cards on the draw phase after that. Keep continually increasing your draw size until this card is removed from the field."

"That's...an odd effect," mused Yami. "If your not careful, you can end up with your entire deck in your hands. Then you'll lose the next turn since you won't have any cards left to draw!"

"But it can be super useful if you just need to get a few cards out of your deck to win...like Exodus!" Yugi piped up. "I'll add this to my deck now!"

"Yugi, wait!" protested Yami as the boy rushed up the stairs, oblivious to his belly jostling about with ever step he took. "This could be dangerous! We should learn more about this and-"

"Pharaoh, relax!" Yugi replied. "If it ends up being more trouble than it's worth, we'll take it out." He dug his deck from the draw of his bedroom desk and slid the card into the stack.

"Yugi! Please!" But The Swell Of Mass found a new home in Yugi's deck. The moment the card was in, Yami was overcome by a strange sensation he could not put his finger on. "Yugi..." he said, "do you feel that? Something is not...quite right..."

"I don't feel anything," retorted Yugi. "A little hungry, but that's because I still have snacks downstairs!"

"Perhaps...perhaps you're right," Yami replied. "Still, that card uneases me..."

"If you're so scared of it..."

"I am not scared of it!" barked Yami.

"...we can invite Joey over for a game and give it a test drive. Otherwise, Nakamura Vs. Klein from the World Duel Monsters '99 Cup is replaying on TV next, and I want to make sure I have enough treats to get me through it!"
1111.title: Lucky Day?

11112.content:
It was Yugi's first draw and the card he picked up was The Swell Of Mass. "Cool! I'll get to see how this works out!" he thought to himself.

Yami typically participated in duels himself but let Yugi take control for this one. It was a low-stakes battle against Joey in his backyard, after all, and not the finals of a global Duel Monsters tournament. "Yes, I'm interested in seeing what kind of strategy we can develop around that card."

Yugi slid the card in a slot in his Duel Disk and loudly announced, "I play The Swell Of Mass!" A hologram of a blubbery demon materialized on the field.

"Gross, Yug!" yelled Joey. "What the heck's that thing?"

"The Swell Of Mass! It increases my draw limit every turn!" The demon hologram chortled and it's enormous belly wobbled about.

"Ain't heard of that card before! Where do you keep getting these rare cards?"

Yugi didn't reply and instead played Kuriboh in attack mode.

On his next turn, drew two cards: The Dark Magician and the Left Arm Of Exodus. The fat demon chuckled and Yugi saw the hologram swell up a bit.

Yugi's following turn netted him three cards, one of which was another piece of Exodus. The Swell Of Mass demon's belly had grown to the point it was hanging its knees.

"I nearly have all of Exodus!" Yugi thought to himself as he drew four cards the beginning of his turn. The demon's neck was now lost under a tire of lard and was becoming more spherical with each passing turn.

"Heh, big lunch, Yug?" Joey yelled from across the yard.

"Huh? What do you mean by that, Joey?" Yugi yelled back as he arranged his cards. His best friend pointed to his own abdomen. Yugi looked down and was shocked to see the state of himself. His stomach, once doughy yet small, had blimped up during the course of the duel. Sticking out nearly a foot in all directions, the ball of fat was large enough to block Yugi's view of his toes (Though that was the least of his worries at the moment). His globe of a gut was testing the limits of his black tank top which, while it had survived so far, did not look like it could handle Yugi's belly much long. His bellybutton, now considerably wider, left an indent in fabric.

Panicked, Yugi took his free hand and prodded at his stomach to see if it was real. It most certainly was and his finger sunk an inch into the flabby flesh. His chub quivered at the mildest touch.

"H-how..." he stuttered.

"Yugi, we must figure out what is happening to you!" Yami chimed in.

"But..." Yugi said to himself, grabbing a small handful of bellyfat. "...it's not that bad, is it? And I don't want to lose to Joey..."

"Yugi! Stop the match at once!" Yami barked.
11112.title: The Swell Of Mass In Action

Nearly a third of Yugi's pale tummy stuck out from under his top, lard that jiggled violently at any slight movement. A cavernous bellybutton punctuated the pasty ball of flesh, and the mass stuck out well over a foot in front of the boy and sagged a few inches down obscuring the missing button and ripped zipper of Yugi's jeans (The button exploded off two turns ago, unbeknownst to both of them). "S-stop it!" Yugi pled as slapped away Joey's grabby hands. His best friend managed to jab a few fingers into Yugi's plush sides. This caused the boy to double over in giggles. "P-please, Joey! Stop!" he begged again while fending off another attack.

"Okay, okay, Yug," Joey said after a couple more minutes of torturing his friend. "Let's get back inside."

The smaller boy lead the way. Joey saw that the back of Yugi's pants had partially blown open during their impromptu tickle fight. An inch and a half of his white briefs was visible. The taller boy chuckled to himself.

"Say funny, Joey?"

"Nah. Don't worry about it."

***

It took Yugi nearly fifteen minutes to yank off his jeans as he undressed for bed that night. He was surprised to find the button gone and zipper down, but Yugi struggled to get the denim passed his thighs. His bulbous gut didn't help as it wobbled to and fro while he shimmed his jeans off. But he eventual won the battle. Kicking the jeans off to a corner of his bedroom, Yugi noticed a two inch wide hole in the seat of his pants. His jeans turned crimson slightly.

Now just in his briefs, Yugi ran a thumb between the waistband and his hips. Hissing in pain, he pushed back the side of his gut a bit and saw angry red marks where his underwear had been tightly constraining against his skin all day. He inched the waistband down a bit giving his skin relief but exposing the top of butt crack.

Seeing this, seeing Yugi not even bothered by today's sudden expansion, and now seeing him becoming too large for even his underwear, Yami decided he needed to speak.

"Get rid of the card, Yugi. Get rid of The Swell of Mass."

Yugi ignored him. Sitting his wide rump down onto his bed, the frame creaked as it was unaccustomed to his new weight.

"We're getting rid of it, Yugi! You've seen what dark magic it does!"

"No, I'm not getting rid of it!" Yugi barked back. "Do you see how easily I won? With a few more tweaks of my deck, I can be unstoppable!"

"And your weight will be unstoppable too! Enter another tournament and they'll have to carry you out on a forklift by the end!"

"I won't use it all the time! Just for important battles!" the boy reasoned.

"Yugi, every battle is important to you. But if you don't destroy that card, I'll find a way to do it myself."

Yugi grumbled. "You know, Yami…"

Something about that card's image bothered him. It reminded him of something he could not place a finger on. Something th-

"Pharaoh!" yelled Sorcerer Seto. "The spell is prepared! Are you ready for the enchantment?"

Yami had a flashback to thousands of years ago when he was Pharaoh. His royal chambers were empty except for Sorcerer Seto with a unrolled scroll in his hands.

"I do not know, Sorcerer," Yami heard himself say. "Are you sure this is necessary?"

"During a year of famine, it is needed now more so than ever!" Seto barked. "A nation is only as strong as its King, and a King must be strong even when his nation grows hungry! And this will show to your rival kingdoms how strong you are!"

"Agreed," the Pharaoh remarked. "I am just unsu-"

The Pharaoh paused, then took a deep breath. "I...I do. Come, complete the spell."

Yami's vision flashed bright and, for a mere second, his body felt like it filled the royal chamber instantly. His ears were flooded with sounds of ripping fabric and groaning skin. And then he was back in Yugi's bedroom.

"Pharaoh, are you okay? You seemed to be..." Yugi began, but Yami shook his head.

"I...I'm fine now," he said, returning The Swell Of Mass to Yugi's deck.

"Are you? You looked...off. Is there something you wanted to tell me?"

Since Kaiba was too busy laughing, he failed to notice that his own were starting to slip down his legs, revealing more of his underwear. Due to the fact that, his button wasn't on his person, his zipper was down, and the main fact that his underwear was made from spandex, were all good reasons for his pants to start slipping down. Kaiba cut off his laughter, abruptly, as he felt his pants collide with floor.

Yami noticed this, went wide-eyed, and started smiling a smile that had never been seen on him. "I don't think you're one to talk about 'showing off.' Are those little chicks I see?" It was Kaiba's turn to go dark red in the face, just as Yami had. Yami, however, was too busy laughing at his own remark. Soon, a few other giggles and laughs could be heard from other customers as they looked at the sight bestowed upon them. And, it truly was a sight.

1113.content:
Yugi was less surprised at seeing Bakura at the door than he was surprised to see the ponderous gut the boy was now sporting. The white-haired boy's blue and white striped shirt was stretched to its absolute limit by a pale doughy belly that jutted out nearly a foot from his once-trim abdomen. The hem of Bakura's shirt barely covered his bellybutton, and had he not been wearing his light blue jacket, Yugi would have seen the stressed seems of the shirt which threatened to rip apart at a moment's notice.

Yugi's eyes darted from Bakura's belly back up the his handsome face. "Bakura! Come in! What's going on?"

Bakura stepped inside Yugi's home. His gut wobbled as he walked and now his shirt rode up an extra inch, completely exposing his bellybutton. Yet he didn't seemed bothered or even seemed to noticed anything was off at all.

"Hello Yugi," he said with a slight bow that brought attention to the puffy mounds of fat growing on his chest as well. "Is your Grandfather home? I believe he received a package for me."

"Oh! Uh, well, he's going to be gone for a few weeks. And he didn't mention any sort of packages for you..." Yugi muttered.

"Could you please take a look? It's quite an important item I need," Bakura asked.

"Okay. Wait here. I'll look around." Yugi dashed off and it was Bakura's time to notice the blossoming belly on the short boy.

Bakura's eyes narrowed and an evil smirk crept up on his face. "You're already doing my work for me, Yugi..." he said to himself in a voice several octaves lower than his own. "Still..." From his jeans pocket, he pulled out a single Dual Monsters card: The Swell Of Mass. "It took some time and a toll on my waistline, but I finally perfected the curse. Once it takes hold, it will only be a matter of time before you're too heavy and swollen and fat to keep me from plucking your Millennium Puzzle from around your neck...Now, where..."

Bakura glancesld around the living room and saw Yugi's deck on the coffee table. "Perfect!" grunted Bakura. He shuffled over to it, swearing as he felt his jeans groan and strain as he moved. "I'm getting a bigger outfit or a gym membership as soon as I'm done..." The Swell Of Mass was quickly stuck into the middle of Yugi's deck. Bakura smirked again as he placed the cards back onto the table.

He waited for Yugi to come back. The white-haired boy noticed the pile of snacks on the coffee table. His pale belly rumbled and started reaching for a Twinkie. "No!" he commanded himself, pulling back his arm. "I've already done enough damage to myself. It will take me months before I'm thin enough to see my toes again!"

Yugi wandered back into the living room and saw Baruka staring intently at the pile of goodies on the coffee table. "Uh, Baruka, are you okay?"

He snapped out of it and turned to Yugi with a pleasant smile on his face. "Oh, yes. I'm just...a little peckish," he said. His voice was no longer dark and gravely. "Did you have any luck?" Bakura asked, knowing what the answer was already.

"Sorry, I didn't find anything," Yugi apologized. "If it's that big of a deal, I can try calling him a-"

"No! No big deal!" Bakura interjected as he shuffled back towards the door. "Thanks for looking and I'll see y-" He was cut off by a loud grumble that erupted from his vast gut. Bakura's pale cheeks turned bright red and Yugi had to stifle a chuckle.

"Peckish, huh?" joked Yugi.

Baruka unconsciously tugged his shirt down over his gut. "I'll guess I'll better get going then!"

"Wait!" said Yugi. "Don't go! We can..."

Bakura paused. It would be best if he left and let the curse do its work on Yugi, but the nagging pain in his gut was growing and those snack cakes looked so good. "Well, maybe just for a bit..." The white-haired boy leaned forward to grab a treat but the edge of his jacket brushed against Yugi's deck, sending it to the floor. Bakura's heart stopped when he saw The Swell Of Mass lying face-up on the ground. He panicked and quickly bent down to grab the cards before Yugi saw the newest addition to his deck.

As Bakura leaned down, a loud rip came from his jeans. Yugi brought his hands up to his face, struggling not to burst out laughing. Cheeks now blazing red, Bakura tossed to reassembled deck onto the table. He reached around towards his rear and felt not denim but cotton. Twisting around, Baruka saw the five inch rip in the back of his pants. His tight baby blue briefs were exposed.

"I...uh, this is...umm," Bakura sputtered.
This only forced the laughs out of Yugi and drove the white-haired boy's cheeks to turn an even deeper shade of crimson. "It's...it's not funny!" he yelled, trying not to lose his temper.

Yugi wiped a tear from his eye. "Sorry, but that was hilarious!"

"It was not!" retorted Bakura who was not having much luck bringing the spilt ends of his jeans together and cover up his exposed rear. "Do...do you have anything...that..."

"Yeah, yeah," Yugi said with a sigh as he headed back upstairs. "I'll see if I have anything!"

After a brief search in his closet, Yugi pulled out a pair of black cotton shorts with an elastic waistband. He stretched the waistband to it's maximum. "Think these will fit Bakura?" he asked Yami.

"That wasn't very nice of you, Yugi," he replied.

"What? It was funny! And his underwear was blue!" Yugi said as he started to chuckle again.

"You're not looking too skinny yourself, Yugi. What if it had been you instead? Would you have liked it if Bakura of laughing at you instead?"

Baruka grumbled as he looked into his shopping bag. Oversized shirts, sweatpants, and underwear better suited to handle his rounded out rear. "This is only temporary. A few weeks at most," he muttered to himself. "I'll be sure to pass these along to Yugi once he's..."

"I'm all done!" Yugi said, as he approached Baruka who sat on a bench in the mail, pale legs exposed to the conditioned air due to the cotton shorts Yugi lent him. The spikey-haired boy held up a shopping bag. "Need to pick up anything else?"

Baruka stuffed another grumble. "No, I'm fine," he said curtly.

"Are you...you know, still mad of this morning?" he asked.

Here's what Baruka wanted to say: "No, I'm mad because you're supposed to be well on your way to gorging yourself into a blob of pathetic fat! You're supposed to be getting too big and heavy and huge to do anything but watch as I snatch your Millennium Puzzle away from you! But all I've accomplished today is to embarrass myself and buy clothes to hid the blubber I put on trying to curse you!"

Here's what Baruka actually said: "...yes."

Yugi sighed and sat next him on the bench. "Again, I'm sorry. I of all people shouldn't be laughing at you because you... you know, packed on a few pounds. Hey, I gained a few myself!" He quickly pulled up his shirt, flashing Baruka his doughy gut briefly before tugging his shirt back down. "We're just bulking up, I guess!"

"We're both packing on lard, you nitwit. Not bulk. But you've given me an idea. I might have to put my diet on hold, but it's worthwhile to get you to willingly let yourself go and give in to the curse" Baruka thought to himself.

Baruka chuckled. "You know, I'm kinda glad that happened around you and not someone like Joey or Tristan. They would have never let it go! But sometimes boys bulk up! And you understand that, Yugi! I just packed on a few!" The white-haired boy, revolted at the idea but saw its utility, quickly flash Yugi his own rounder gut before yanking his skin-tight shirt back down over his dome of a belly.

Yugi smiled at Baruka. "So what did you buy?" he asked, gesturing to his shopping bag.

"Oh, some sweatpants and shirts."

The spikey-haired boy chuckled. He reached into his own shopping bag and pulled out a a few pairs of sweatpants of his own. "Much more forgiving on the waistline than jeans!"

"That is true, my friend!" Baruka leaned over and gave Yugi's belly a playful pat. "Now, what should we do next? There is a big food court in this mall, and I think two growing boys might be able to do some damage to it!"

Baruka looked thrilled. The Swell Of Mass card he placed in the deck earlier in the day was finally taking effect. "You thought what?"

Yuri stared blankly for a moment before turning his gaze to Baruka. "...food court?"

Baruka lifted himself from the bench, not caring that his shirt was riding up his pale flab again. "Yes! Food! This way!" Yugi obediently rose to his feet and Baruka led him on with a hand around the shorter boy's lovehandle.

"My treat, Yugi..."

122.content:
The sound of groaning and hissing was the last thing Joey remember hearing before he woke up. The blonde boy shook his head and rubbed his eyes. "Another...another one of those stupid dreams..." he mutter to himself. Throughout the past week, Joey's dreams had been exceptionally bizarre though they all followed the same pattern: In some way, Joey ends up the size of a blimp and ready to pop. And it is always Yugi who's doing it.

Monday night, he dreamed that Yugi had glued a rubber tube to his mouth and then proceeded to blow him up like a balloon.

Tuesday night, Joey dreamt that Yugi was a butler and served him gallon after gallon of fizzy soda until he was a big as a water bed.

Wednesday, he had a dream where Yugi had snuck a hose down the back of his pants. That hose was connected to a helium tank which almost instantly transformed Joey into a parade float.

Tonight was the weirdest dream. In it, Yugi approached Joey and, without warning, locked lips with him. But soon he realized that Yugi was blowing up his body with air. Joey tried to shove Yugi anyway, but the air flow was relentless and Joey's body expanded in all directions. Yugi only stopped to utter "He's gonna blow!" to his best friend before puffing him up to his absolute limit.

Joey fetched himself a glass of cold water from his kitchen. Back in his bedroom, he noticed the cards and crumpled foil on his desk. Last week, his best friend had gifted him a booster pack of Duel Monster cards. None were that rare, with the exception of one.

Joey clicked on his desk light and sat down. He grabbed the new cards and thumbed through them. "Man-Eater Bug, Monster Reborn, Kunai With Chain...Air Indulgence..."

He had never see or heard of this card before. Holding the card up to the light, Joey studied the image of a greedy face with bulbous cheeks sucking in air. It reminded him of those cartoons of storm clouds viciously blowing wind. But in this case, the angry face was taking in air.

"Trap Card. When activated, restore your Life Points 200 points for each card placed on the field... including this card. Not bad..." Joey said. "It'll help when I'm getting my butt kicked."

Clicking off his desk light, Joey tossed the cards back onto his desk and went back to bed where he had yet another strange dream where Dream Yugi grows him massive.

***

"You okay, Joey?"

He yawned, again. Throughout the school day, Joey had barely been able to stay awake. Because of his dreams, his sleep had been restless and was now paying its toll on him. Joey was barely shuffling his feet along the sidewalk as he and his best friend headed home for the day. "Yeah, I'm just tired. That's all. Ain't been sleeping well."

"Oh, I'm sorry, Joey," Yugi said. "Why haven't you been sleeping well?"

"Just...dumb reasons."

"Have you been eating spicy foods before bed again?" Yugi asked.

Joey gave him a slight shove. "No! I've just been having...uh, weird dreams."

"Like?"

"Like none of your business."

"Come on, Joey, we're best friends. If something is bothering you, I want to know so I can help."

Joey yawned again. "Well, maybe you can help out with something..."
122.title: Joey and His Dreams

1221.content:
The only detail Joey left out was about the dream where Yugi had locked lips with him to blow him up. The conversation was awkward enough as it was, and he felt Yugi didn't need to know his best friend was dreaming about making out with him.

"Huh...all kind of the same," Yugi pondered as he laid back in his bedroom. "And they started last week?"

"Yep." Joey's head was laying on the desk in Yugi's bedroom. Yugi didn't offer a spot on his own bed lest his friend might pass out when recalling his dreams. "Even when I go back to sleep, they're there."

"Hmm... well, I don't kn-"

"Yugi. I have an idea." Yami had chimed in inside Yugi's head.

"What do you have in mind?" he replied internally to his other self.

"There might be a way for me to...enter Joey's dreams. I can observe what is going on and find out the cause of these strange dreams."

"That's pretty invasive," Yugi said. "It's not like we can ask him for permission for you to enter his dreams. He could end up dreaming about something really personal that he doesn't want me to know about."

"True, but you do you have anything better in mind?"

Yugi thought for a moment. "Joey, bad dreams are kind of like a song that's stuck in your head."

Joey picked his head up and shot Yugi an incredulous look. "...huh?"

"The way I get songs out of my head is by listening to them. I think the same is kinda true for dreams. When I was younger, I used to have nightmares all of the time of monsters in the basement attacking me. They only went away once I started going into the basement and realizing that it wasn't scary and that I wasn't going to be attacked by vampire bats. I stopped having those dreams almost immediately."

The blonde boy laid his head back down on Yugi's desk. "Great idea, Yug. But people don't turn into blimps in real life, even if I wanted to."

"Yeah, but...that soda dream!" Yugi exclaimed. "That's something that can happen in real life! Not the whole getting really full thing, but maybe chugging down a load of soda will help get whatever monkey off your back and get rid of those dreams!"

"Yug, you're crazy," groaned Joey.

"Well, do you have a better idea?" replied Yugi.

"Yeah. Wait it out. They came one day. They'll go away one day," said Joey. "I guess I'll be stuck feeling tired and miserable in the meantime."

12211.content:
It was shortly after 11pm when Joey started snoring. Yugi, who was lying on his best friend's bedroom floor in a sleeping bag, knew this was Yami's time to get to work.

"Ready?"

"Ready."

Yugi had suggested that he spend the night at Joey's. The reason he offered was that the nightmares wouldn't bother Joey and he could finally have a restful night of sleep if he knew a friend was there. He was reluctant at first, but Joey eventually agreed. And now the sleeping boy was within feet of Yugi, and Yami could enter into Joey's dream state.

"Remember: Just watch. We don't want him to suspect anything is off," said Yugi.

"Of course. Wish me luck."

***

Yami awoke in a vast, empty warehouse. Empty aside from Joey, who waved him over. "Hey, Yug!"

"Rats," muttered Yami. "So much for stealth. But I didn't think Joey's dream state would be so...empty."

Yami approached Joey, who eyed him up and down. "You look taller, Yug."

"Uh, new boots," he grumbled.

"Woah! And your voice dropped too!" Joey said laughing. "I told you it would happen one day!"

Yami groaned and rolled his eyes. "Joey, don't you..." But before he could finish, both heard the sounds of footsteps. They turned around to see Yugi approaching them with a sly smile on his face. This Dream Yugi seemed to be completely ignore the other man in the room with them.

"Like the new place?" Dream Yugi said to Joey, gesturing to the enormous room around them.

"It's...uh, great, Other Yug," Joey replied.

"It's very big! Don't you think?"

"It is," Joey replied, shooting Yami a worried look.

"Think you'll still fit?" asked Dream Yugi.

"Still fit? Wh-"

"Still fit after I do this!" From out of nowhere, Dream Yugi produced a grey hose with a bright silvery nozzle at the end. Yami's eyes traced the hose that extended endlessly towards one of the wall and disappeared.

Yugi squeezed the nozzle and a blast of air exploded out. "Last time was fun, but so slow!" he said as he menacingly approached Joey, who was cautiously back up. "This will make you into a Joey-shaped blimp in no time!"

"Yug! What's going on? Stop it!" yelled Joey. "I'm tired of this!"

"But I'm not!" Yugi spat back. Another puff of air exploded from the hose nozzle.

Hands up in defense, Joey made eye contact with Yami. He gestured his head towards Dream Yugi who was nearing Joey with a devilish smirk on his face. "Come on, man! Help me out here!"

12212.content:
As Joey collapsed into his bed, both he and Yugi could hear the liters of soda sloshing around in his distended belly. Lifting up his shirt, Joey exposed the medicine ball sized globe that replaced his once flat abdomen. Pale and hairless aside from a trial from his bellybutton to the waistband of his pants, Joey's stomach looked ready to burst and quivered slightly in time with his pulse.

"No more, Yug. I give," groaned Joey. "Another drop and I'll explode!"

Yugi replaced the cap on the 2L bottle of root beer. "Yeah, you look, um, full." Full was an understatement. Joey felt pinned to his bed under the sheer weight of fluid churning around in his stomach.

"Hope this crazy plan of yours work," Joey moaned and he started pulling his shirt off for bedtime but hissed in pain at the slightest wrong movement that jostled his gut. Yugi rushed to the head of Joey's bed and helped gently pull his shirt off. Joey struggled to unbutton his jeans, but managed to free the button and Yugi tugged them off his slender legs.

Clad only in his plaid boxers, Joey shut his eyes. "Dunno if I'll even be able to sleep, Yug. My stomach is killing me!"

"Well, move over a bit." Joey carefully moved over a few inches and Yugi sat on the edge of his bed. The spikey-haired boy gently rested a hand on the peak of Joey's global gut and carefully moved his hand in slow, small circles.

"Hmm....'s good..." Joey moaned. This gave Yugi the confidence to have his other hand join in and rub down his overfilled belly. Grunts and moans escaped from Joey, and soon the bloated boy let to an incredible belch.

Yugi chuckled. "Feeling better? Joey? You feeling better?" But he had already passed out.

***

"Is Joey going to be late for class again?" Tristan asked.

"He's here!" Yugi said. "He's probably stopping by the vending machines first."

Tristan shook his head. "They should install a vending machine just for Joey. He dumps enough money into them..."

Yugi laughed. "Don't give Joey any ideas!"

"Don't get me any ideas about what?"

Standing in the classroom doorway was Joey with four bottles of soda, two in each hand. He shuffled sideways into the classroom, his hips now too wide for the school's doorframes, his flabby belly and chest jiggling about. As he did so, both Yugi and Tristan saw how tight Joey's school uniform was getting on him. He had upgraded to the largest pants and shirts they had on hand, but the seams were already straining and buttons threatened to burst. Even as he waddled towards his desk, Yugi saw Joey's white undershirt between gaps of buttons ready to explode apart. Yugi looked forward to the day Joey was deemed by the school to be too big for a uniform. He enjoyed watching Joey's huge gut wobble and bounce around, but it can never do that freely when constrained by such a tight shirt.

Joey placed his sodas on the desk besides Yugi and waddled around behind it. "Yug, some help?" the big blonde boy said, nodding to the two chairs behind him. Yugi lept up and positioned the chairs behind Joey's vast rump, one to support each heavy buttcheek.

"You're good!" said Yugi. And Joey lowered himself onto the chairs which creaked ominously under his weight.

Tristan nudged Yugi. "Better get your boyfriend to switch to Diet before he needs a third chair."

Yugi eyed Joey up and down, taking in the sight of the enormous boy he found cuter with every inch he swelled.

"Is he still talkin' about me?" asked Joey as a pudgy hand opened a bottle of cola.

"Yeah, he said 'Joey, wake up!'"

He nearly choked on his cola. "Wh-wha?" Joey asking while coughing.

"Wake up, Joey! Did it work?"

Joey came to. It took him a second to realized he was in his bedroom, still in his boxers but his stomach noticeably less swollen. He glanced outside of his bedroom window and say it was a bright, sunny morning.

"How'd you sleep?" Yugi asked excitedly.

"I...I slept pretty good!" Joey replied. "Best sleep I had all week!"

"Great! Any dreams at all?"

Joey gulped. "Uh..."

Close Friends: Although he doesn't have any present day friends, he's not above forming alliances with fellow evildoers, such as Yami Bakura or Yami Marik
Worst Enemies: Anyone who opposes him.

Habits: Those large, bat-wing bangs of his tend to rise, fall and react to whatever emotion Runihura is experiencing. Even though they're made of hair, they're oddly stiff.

Likes: Vengeance, Duel Monsters, Shadow Games, forming overly complex plans, torturing present-day mortals, games of wit, flaunting his intellect, flirting with equally attractive 'evil' men.
Dislikes: Foiling his plots, not submitting to him, present-day mortals, not being able to sleep, trying to adapt to modern world culture, and hates being called Blackie as much as Yamato does.

Phobias and Mental Illnesses: Megalomania, psychosis, and sadism.
Physical Disabilities: None.

Character Alignment: Drifts between Lawful Evil and Chaotic Evil.

Theme Song(s): All Hail The Shadow King - www.youtube.com/watch?v=d0_5_T…

Miscellaneous Trivia: Runihura watches from the shadows when Yamato is playing games or Duel Monsters because he can learn new tricks in an instant.
1551.title: Enter Yamato Yoshida And Runihura Ammon

choices: Someone else walks into Burger World...
15511.content:
Yamato stammered into the doors of Burger World, looking for his new friends amongst the crowd of hungry customers. It was lunchtime and the joint was packed with people, almost too much for the poor Japanese lad to handle. Suddenly, he felt someone grab at him by the head and put in a headlock! It was Joey, simply trying to mess with him by giving him a welcoming noogie.

"Hey Yama', what's up? Nyeh heh heh!" Said the blonde jokingly, still rubbing his knuckles into Yamato's jet black hair.

"D-did you have to do that..?" Yamato replied, slightly annoyed. Poor guy wasn't used to joking around, though it was probably why they called him there. "And why did you call me 'Yama'?"

"Would ya rather I called ya 'Blackie'?"

"...Yama's fine, I guess. Ah hah..." Came a weak chuckle.

"Thought so, heh. Well c'mon, Yamato! Yug' and I already ordered our lunch!" Joey pulled Yamato into one of the booths near the open windows. Yugi was already sitting beside them, with Yamato squished in the middle. On the table was an unrealistic pile of food. Burgers, fries, onion rings, chicken snack wraps; it was almost as if the whole menu was on the table and tripled in number.

"W-wow..." Yamato coughed. "Did you think we needed all this?"

"Think of it as an initiation." Yugi smirked. The two wanted to introduce this new arrival into their circle of friendship, and what better way than with stuffing their faces? After all, Joey's big appetite, and Yugi's love of burgers shared only by Yamato himself, it seemed perfect. On the inside, he was very excited to prove himself to his new buddies.

"It's time to d-d-d-dig in!"
15511.title: Lunch Rush!

155111.content:
"Ggrrooaahh.." Moaned the three as they rubbed their painfully stuffed bellies. Yamato had put away the most burgers, and thus, his bloated tummy pressed up against Yugi and Joey's. Joey gave the cute nerd a pat on the shoulder.

"Not bad, Yamat- UUUURRPPPP!" He belched, causing his own gut to jiggle. "...Whew! That was a good one, wasn't it Yug'?"

"Yep!" Yugi smiled, rubbing the sides of his swelled stomach. His tank top had rode up pretty far, almost exposing his developing moobs. "I think we can say for sure that you're our new friend, Yamato. Not that you weren't going to be, but we just wanted to have some first-impression fun." He chuckled, patting his stuffed belly.

"Oooh... Ulp... Thanks, Yugi. You two are much better than my old so-called friends..." Yamato smiled. In his old hometown, he was a big target for bullying thanks to his nerdy interests and being sheltered. He winced a little bit, remembering the painful atomic wedgies he'd get.

"Nyeh? Don' worry about them, buddy! We're your pals now!" Joey reassured.

"Yeah, friends who'll always be together!" Yugi added. "Group hug!"

As they moved in for a hug, their bellies sloshed and rippled up against each other. All three had a slight blush with this warm, soft hug. So much that it gave Joey an idea.

"Hey guys, how about we move this partay to my place! I got some new stuff there that will really liven things up!"

Yamato grinned. "Yes! No one's ever invited me to their house before!"

"Kiss those days of bullying goodbye, Yamato!" Yugi chimed, wrapping his arm around the raven-haired boy. "Because with us, we'll have your back!"

Yamato just beamed with happiness. He finally had a feeling of acceptance. As the three walked out of Burger World, Yugi and Joey tried to keep Yamato steady. Being the winner of the eating contest they had, his belly was the biggest and heaviest.
155111.title: Burger Bellies

choices: It was Ryou Bakura, asking if Yamato would come over for tea.
It was Marik Ishtar, who wanted to recruit Runihura into the Evil Council.
15512.content:
"A massive thunderstorm has moved into Domino City. Heavy rainfall and possible power outage is expected. All citizens are advised to stay indoors. In other news..."

*click*

"Ugh..." Groaned the black-haired spirit. "These modern mortals are just too boring..."

Runihura managed to stand himself up in front of the porch window. His large, sharp bangs drooped as he lost himself in the falling rain. This modern world was taking a toll on his already demented mind. He wished he could just leave the planet in ruin, and take back his rightful place as the dark lord that once ruled his long-forgotten home, the kingdom of Khu Kek. Not even remembering the first genocidal war he spearheaded against the rival City of Light so many centuries ago couldn't bring a smirk to his face. Deep inside, the shadows of hatred churned within his very soul.

Suddenly, his host's cell phone rang. "Oh Ra, what now? Can't people see I'm brooding?" He begrudgingly answered it.

"What the fuck do you want?"
15512.title: A New Beginning?

155122.content:
"WAZZUUUUU-"

"Oh, fuck me..." Runihura knew exactly who was calling him.

"-UUUAAAAP?! Hey Blackie, I got a proposition for you! And by proposition, I mean non-paying position! Join me and my evil council and we shall defeat Yugi Muto once and for all!" The Egyptian heartthrob hammed it up over the line, though it proved useless. Runihura never had any interest in joining some run-of-the-mill villain club. He was more of a lone ranger.

"Is this about that starfish-headed kid again, Marik? I already told you, my beef is with the world, not a baby panda."

"Bu-but I know the secret to his power! For real this time!" He proclaimed. "It's not that puzzle of his... it's his snacks! I saw him eating alone last night!"

Runihura facepalmed. "...Where's that albino that hangs out with you? I need someone to talk to who isn't completely retarded."

"Of course, Blackie Boy! And Bakura's on the line with me! Say hello, Fluffy!"

"Not a kitty!" Bakura fumed. "And I'm not saying hello."

"Hah! You just did!"

"Bugger off, Marik!"

Runihura quickly grew tired of the two she-males arguing. "Well hot dog, but no thanks. The last thing I need is to waste my brainpower on such a fruitless operation such as yours."

"B-but..."

"The answer is NO, Marik."

Runihura listened for a minute or two, and heard a faint sniffling. It started to get louder, now joined by a distraught moan. "...Please tell me you aren't making the sad puppy-eyed quivering lip face again..."

Nothing but a pained moan came from the blond's mouth. Runihura could sympathize with Bakura's own annoyed groan heard over the other line.

"Alright! Fine, Marik!" Runihura gave in. "But if this goes about as well as I think it will, I'll be using that tattoo of yours as my personal bath towel!"

"Friggin' sweet!" Marik exclaimed. "We'll be right there!" *click*

"Ra damn it..."

-------------------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

The sound of a tricked out motorcycle soon came to the front of the Yoshida apartment. Marik and Bakura were indeed there in a flash, but something was different about them.

"What are you waiting for, Runihura? Hop on!"

Runihura eyed the Egyptian's waistline. Marik had put on a little weight, and his newly gained muffintop really showed. That midriff shirt was fabulous, but did nothing to hide it. Bakura tried not to make eye contact; he certainly was fatter than Marik, and his larger belly made his striped shirt ride up. He was so embarrassed and irritated at the same time, he kept looking away from his fellow evil spirit. In fact, he was so plump that he was stuck in one of the sidecars Marik put on his motorcycle.

The hidden destroyer raised a brow. "I'm sorry, I'm waiting for Marik Ishtar. You know, the one with the washboard abs and womanly fashion sense?" He snarked before turning his attention to Bakura. "And to think, the last I saw of you, you were tan, built and moderately sexy. Now you're all pale and flabby. Please tell me your host ate one too many cream puffs."

Marik was unamused, neither was Bakura. "Get in, smartass." He grumbled.

As the three rode off into the night, Runihura still had their newfound pudginess on his mind.

"And you sacrificed your abs, why?" He asked in a rather droll tone.

"It's all part of the plan, baby!"

15523222.title: Moar choices!

info.brief_description: All the good-looking males in Yu-Gi-Oh!; they're so skinny, no? Let's fix that!
info.description:
Yu-Gi-Oh! was my first anime, and is still my most favorite anime to date. But like I said, these boys are so scrawny. It's time to dive into the Yu-Gi-Oh! universe and makes theses guy grow!

It's basically just a weird do-what-you'd-like story, with a few rules to follow:

-Only males can grow!: The ratio of male to female expansion, at least in Yu-Gi-Oh!, tips far too much in the female's favor. I mean, sheesh, we have so many guys (good-looking guys to boot), there has to be some ways to blow 'em up. Females are allowed in the stories, but not allowed to grow themselves.
-Absolutely no weight restrictions!: Let's face it, it isn't as much fun unless they get ridiculously huge. Therefore, make them as big as you like!
-Gassiness, slobiness and sweatiness is allowed!: Since this is a primarily fetish-driven story, there's no problems if you want to include any of these.
-No lethal popping/bursting or vore, please!: I have no problems with non-lethal popping and vore, but please keep it to a down-low.
-Yaoi is perfectly fine!: Hell, especially with Bakura/Marik, it's encouraged! Just be sure that the couples aren't too outrageous, okay?
-Weirdness is also encouraged!: Try to think of weird, new ways to get these dudes to embiggen. Be it magical children's cards or some just plain otherworldly strangeness, just so long as it at least tries to blend in with the Yu-Gi-Oh! universe.
-Canon and/or Abridged personalities are acceptable!: May depend on choice, but in these stories it's up to you. Comedy is not discouraged.
-Any males from the original Yu-Gi-Oh!, GX, 5Ds, and Zexal are allowed!: Although I prefer the original, I have no qualms if you want to expand any of the guys from GX, 5Ds, or Zexal.
-Including male fan characters is alright!: I know it's a stretch, but even I have two Yu-Gi-Oh! fan characters that I wouldn't mind including in the story (and porking up, as well!). If you want to include your male FCs, send me a message about them. I'd love to know them before including them, and I'd love to share mine in return!
-Have fun!: Just to make this come out great, remember to have fun with it!
